content: Drizzle ORM notification preferences schema pattern: use a user_notification_preferences table with user_id FK, per-channel booleans (email_enabled, in_app_enabled), per-type JSONB or normalized rows (type, channel, frequency enum), and quiet_hours JSONB. Performance: index on user_id. For fine-grained control, a normalized notification_preferences table with (user_id, notification_type, channel, frequency) as a composite key works better than a single JSONB blob. Drizzle query pattern: db.select().from(notificationPreferences).where(eq(notificationPreferences.userId, userId)).
